operator: Teusajaure cabin host (STF) or County Administrative Board rowboats
how_it_works: About 1 km of the trail is covered by boat. Rowboats from the County Administrative Board are available, or you can get a ride from the STF cabin host at Teusajaure. To cross from the far shore, raise the flag or container so the cabin host sees you are waiting; the times below then apply with a 15 minute delay.

season.note: On September 13 the mountain cabins close and hosts usually leave around lunchtime, so afternoon departures are cancelled that day and the morning departure is the last crossing.
season.weather_note: Crossings are cancelled in severe weather conditions or unsuitable water levels.

booking: No advance booking mentioned as required; arranged directly with the cabin host or via the flag/container signal system from the far shore.

sources.note: This crossing has no separate branded operator site (unlike M/S Langas, Sitojaure, or Aktse) -- it is run directly by the STF cabin host at Teusajaure, or via County Administrative Board rowboats. This STF mountain-guide page is therefore already the official primary source for this crossing.
